title: TTRP Codax Animals
description: This is a resourcepack that changes every* animal texture into an animal wearing a codax outfit.
body:
# 💬 Description
A Funny Resource Pack That Replaces Animal Textures Into Animals Wearing A Codax Outfit.
(Check Gallery To See Who Codax Is)

Just download it, load in game, and enjoy!

![Axolotl Wearing Codax Outfit.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb1802b67e4b981f5baaee4453e11a166e430188.png)

It's just a silly resourcepack ya know? **(Blame SUN and CODAX for the creation of this)**
